title: updated license for Glassbox
summary:
today i worked on the legal side of Glassbox. i changed the project license from MIT to Apache License 2.0. 

i want more people to use the code without worrying about patents. my symbolic regression research is going okay. i am still testing the new evolution strategy. it is finding better equations than the old method.
commitMessages: chore: update project license from MIT to Apache License 2.0
